# GitHub Copilot Instructions

The canonical instructions for this repository live in **[`claude.md`](../claude.md)**.
Read it before generating code or suggestions — it is the single source of truth.

Edward is a mobile-first **Next.js 14 (App Router)** PWA in **TypeScript (strict)** with
**Tailwind CSS** — a two-screen morning briefing (Scoreboard + Play Caller) for a
multi-channel YouTube creator. Follow the tech stack, TypeScript interfaces, API
contracts, design tokens, and v1 scope defined in [`claude.md`](../claude.md).

Issue and label conventions are in [`docs/issue-workflow.md`](../docs/issue-workflow.md).
Keep v1 small — check "What v1 is NOT" in [`claude.md`](../claude.md) before suggesting new features.
